preconditions: Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting the workflow.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can open the Login page from the Home page using the person/profile button
steps: Launch the WashTab application.
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state.
Click the person/profile button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page and the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and interactable.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after navigation from Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Observe the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Login page controls are visible, enabled, and available for interaction without UI rendering issues.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked while entering credentials on the Login page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page person/profile button.
Enter text into the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks entered characters during typing and does not display the plain text password value.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication using approved credentials returns user to authenticated Home state
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter Username as krisadmin.
Enter Password as Carwash#1.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page in authenticated state, and authenticated user identity and authenticated-only feature areas become visible.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated Home page state persists immediately after successful login transition
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter approved credentials with Username krisadmin and Password Carwash#1.
Click the Login button.
Observe the Home page after redirection.
testCases.expectedResult: The SPA transitions from the Login page to the Home page authenticated state without remaining on the Login page, and authenticated-only UI elements are visible.

testCases.title: Verify invalid credentials display generic Failed message and keep user unauthenticated
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter an invalid Username value.
Enter an invalid Password value.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, a generic Failed message is displayed, the user remains unauthenticated, and the application does not transition to authenticated Home state.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page or in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify submission with Username populated and Password blank fails authentication
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter a Username value.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify submission with Password populated and Username blank fails authentication
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter a Password value.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Login page Back button returns user to Home page without authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Click the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest unauthenticated state and authenticated-only UI is not visible.

testCases.title: Verify Login page Home button returns user to Home page without authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page.
Click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to the Home page in guest unauthenticated state and authenticated-only UI is not visible.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing whitespace handling for valid credentials
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter Username value with leading and trailing spaces around krisadmin.
Enter Password value with leading and trailing spaces around Carwash#1.
Click the Login button.
Observe the resulting authentication behavior.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles leading and trailing whitespace according to implemented business behavior and the observed result is consistently applied without application instability.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only values in Username and Password fields fail authentication with generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify very long credential values do not authenticate and application remains stable
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter an excessively long string into the Username field.
Enter an excessively long string into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails safely, the generic Failed message is displayed or the login remains rejected, and the Login page remains stable without broken layout or application crash.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in Username and Password fields do not bypass authentication
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter special characters and symbols into the Username field.
Enter special characters and symbols into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated without unexpected navigation or script execution behavior.

testCases.title: Verify successful login flow begins only from Home page navigation path
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the application is in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter Username as krisadmin.
Enter Password as Carwash#1.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login workflow is initiated through the Home page person/profile button and successful authentication returns the user to authenticated Home state with authenticated-only UI visible.
